proverb_english: A year that does not feed is a year that causes grudges.
meaning_amharic: አንድ ወቅት ወይም አመት መልካም ፍሬ ካላፈራ በሰዎች መካከል ቅሬታና ጥል እንደሚፈጥር ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: If a season or a year is unproductive, it leads to dissatisfaction and conflict among people.

meaning_amharic: ራሱ ችግር ያለበት ሰው ሌላውን ዝቅ አድርጎ ሲያይ ወይም ሲሳለቅበት የሚነገር ምሳሌ ነው።
meaning_english: It is used when someone who has their own flaws or problems mocks or looks down on someone else in a similar or slightly worse situation.

proverb_amharic: አመድ በዱቂት ሲሳቅ ልቡ በንፋስ ውልቁ
proverb_english: While ash laughs at fine dust, its heart is blown away by the wind.
meaning_amharic: ሌላውን ዝቅ አድርጎ የሚመለከት ሰው የራሱን ደካማነት ዘንግቶ በድንገተኛ ችግር ሊጠቃ እንደሚችል ያሳያል።
meaning_english: Someone who mocks others often forgets their own vulnerability and can be easily undone by circumstances.

proverb_english: Do not command your temperamental servant in front of others.
meaning_amharic: ባህሪው አስቸጋሪ የሆነን ሰው በሰው ፊት ማዘዝ ግጭት ሊፈጥር ስለሚችል ጥንቃቄ ማድረግ እንደሚገባ ይመክራል።
meaning_english: It advises being careful when dealing with difficult people in public, as ordering them around might trigger a conflict or embarrassment.

proverb_english: Without agreement between mother-in-law and daughter-in-law, there is only trouble.
meaning_amharic: በቤተሰብ ውስጥ በተለይም በአማትና በምራት መካከል ሰላም ከሌለ የቤቱ ሁኔታ አስቸጋሪ እንደሚሆን ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: It emphasizes that lack of harmony in key family relationships makes the domestic environment very difficult and unpleasant.
